item.title: 苹果公司将生产重心从中国转向印度后，目前约25%的iPhone在印度制造
item.description: 苹果公司去年在印度的iPhone产量增长了约53%，目前四分之一的主打设备在当地生产，这反映出这家美国公司为规避中国关税所做的努力。【原文：Apple Inc. increased iPhone production in India by about 53% last year and now makes a quarter of its marquee devices there, reflecting the US company’s efforts to avoid tariffs on China.】

item.title: 投资者削减杠杆，伊朗冲突与油价飙升搅动印度市场
item.description: 保证金融资已降至11月以来的最低水平。【原文：Margin funding has dropped to the lowest since November.】

item.title: 亚洲信用风险指标下滑，特朗普暗示战争或将终结
item.description: 亚洲信用保护成本创八个月来最大跌幅，此前美国总统特朗普暗示伊朗战争可能即将结束。【原文：The cost of credit protection fell by the most in over eight months in Asia, after President Donald Trump signaled the Iran war may be nearing an end.】

item.title: 市场同时遭受战争、人工智能压力和信贷危机三重冲击
item.description:
多重力量正以难以轻易解决的方式相互碰撞——而传统的逢低买入策略远非万无一失。

【原文：

Multiple forces are colliding in ways that defy easy fixes — and the old playbook of buying the dip is far from guaranteed to work.

】

item.title: 卡米尼亚克将支持激进投资者帕利瑟针对LG化学的行动
item.description: 凯明纳克资产管理公司正支持英国激进投资基金帕利瑟资本发起的行动，旨在改善韩国LG化学公司的公司治理并提升股东价值。【原文：Carmignac Gestion is supporting a campaign by UK-based activist fund Palliser Capital to try to improve corporate governance and boost shareholder value at South Korea’s LG Chem Ltd.】

item.title: 铝价延续跌势，中东供应担忧缓解
item.description: 铝价延续自四年高点以来的跌势，此前美国总统唐纳德·特朗普暗示可能结束伊朗战争，这场战争曾导致中东地区铝供应中断。【原文：Aluminum extended its retreat from a four-year high after US President Donald Trump signaled a possible end to the Iran war, which has disrupted supplies of the metal from the Middle East.】

item.title: 印度央行加大对卢比和债券支持力度，应对油价波动
item.description: 分析师表示，随着原油价格波动加剧通胀风险并给政府财政带来压力，印度央行可能在货币和债券市场中发挥更大作用。【原文：India’s central bank may play a bigger role in both currency and bond markets as volatility in crude oil prices raises the risk of higher inflation and putting pressure on government finances, analysts say.】

item.title: 印尼央行或将捍卫卢比汇率，分析师称油价波动加剧
item.description: 印尼央行可能继续在关键汇率关口附近捍卫印尼盾，因油价波动、美元走强以及伊朗冲突引发的避险资金流动，加剧了市场对该国投资吸引力的担忧。【原文：Indonesia’s central bank may continue to defend the rupiah around a key threshold as volatile oil prices, a stronger dollar and risk-off flows tied to the Iran conflict deepen concerns over the nation’s investment appeal.】

item.title: Planet Labs因伊朗风险延长中东卫星影像延迟
item.description: Planet Labs PBC公司将中东地区商业卫星图像的延迟发布时限从四天延长至两周，因担忧相关情报可能被用于锁定北大西洋公约组织成员国。【原文：Planet Labs PBC is extending its delay on commercial satellite imagery in the Middle East to two weeks from four days over concerns that the intelligence could be used to target North Atlantic Treaty Organization members.】

item.title: 澳大利亚将因伊朗战争实现预算盈余，但家庭收入受挫，BE表示
item.description: 彭博经济研究指出，受伊朗战争推动液化天然气和煤炭出口价格上涨的影响，澳大利亚财政收入将获得提振，但家庭将因汽油成本飙升而承受压力。【原文：Australia’s fiscal coffers are set to be boosted by higher liquefied natural gas and coal export prices fueled by the war in Iran, while households will be hit by surging gasoline costs, according to a research note from Bloomberg Economics.】

item.title: 五角大楼官员认为重启人类中心主义人工智能协议可能性渺茫
item.description: 五角大楼一位高级官员认为，在该公司对政府前所未有的举措——将该公司列为供应链风险——提出法律挑战后，与Anthropic PBC就其人工智能工具的军事用途恢复谈判的可能性微乎其微。【原文：A top Pentagon official sees little chance of resuming negotiations with Anthropic PBC over military use of its artificial intelligence tools following the company’s legal challenge of an unprecedented government move to declare the firm a supply-chain risk.】

item.title: 《金融时报》报道：蒙古国寻求修改里约公司奥尤陶勒盖矿贷款协议
item.description: 据《金融时报》周二报道，蒙古政府正寻求与力拓集团重新谈判一笔贷款，该国曾利用这笔贷款支付其在全球最大铜矿床之一建设项目中的份额。【原文：Mongolia’s government is seeking to renegotiate a loan from Rio Tinto Group, which the nation used to fund its share of building one of the world’s biggest copper deposits, the Financial Times reported Tuesday.】

item.title: 新西兰联储或面临超预期通胀，布雷曼面临考验
item.description: 新西兰通胀率不太可能如央行预测般大幅放缓，因伊朗战争推高燃料成本，市场押注加息时间将提前。【原文：New Zealand inflation is unlikely to slow as much as the central bank predicts as the Iran war lifts fuel costs, increasing bets on an earlier interest-rate hike.】

item.title: 铝价飙升助中国富豪身价飙升至480亿美元
item.description: 2019年张波接管父亲的工业帝国时，这已是一家规模庞大的工业巨头，也是全球最大的铝生产商之一。【原文：When Zhang Bo took over his father’s industrial empire in 2019, it was already a sprawling industrial giant and one of the world’s biggest producers of aluminum.】

item.title: 日本股市反弹，油价回落引发逢低买盘
item.description: 日本股市反弹，因油价下跌缓解了中东冲突引发的部分担忧。不过，投资者仍保持警惕，因特朗普表示战争不会在本周结束。【原文：Japanese stocks bounced back as a fall in oil prices eased some concerns around the Middle East conflict. Still, investors remained on alert as Donald Trump said the war will not end this week.】

item.title: 韩国股市大涨，油价下跌提振风险偏好
item.description: 韩国股市反弹，因特朗普总统暗示伊朗战争可能即将结束，风险偏好情绪随之回升。【原文：South Korean equities bounced back, as risk sentiment recovered after President Donald Trump signaled the Iran war may be ending soon.】

item.title: 英国消费者信心指数因伊朗战争跌至四个月低点
item.description: 最新调查显示，自中东战争爆发以来，英国消费者信心指数急剧下滑。随着这场冲突对全球经济的影响逐渐显现，英国等国经济已开始受到冲击。【原文：UK consumer sentiment has dropped sharply since war broke out in the Middle East, according to a new survey, as the global consequences of the conflict start to take their toll on economies such as Britain’s.】

item.title: 日本确认经济实现增长，高市光一敦促加大投资力度
item.description: 2025年第四季度日本经济增速超出初步报告，得益于企业投资的强劲增长。首相高市早苗正敦促加大支出力度以发展重点产业。【原文：Japan’s economy expanded in the final quarter of 2025 more than initially reported thanks to stronger corporate investment, as Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi urges further spending to develop key industries.】

item.title: 委内瑞拉访美后以"特朗普速度"推进矿业改革
item.description: 委内瑞拉国民议会初步批准了一项新的采矿法案，政府承诺将以"特朗普速度"振兴该行业并吸引外资。【原文：Venezuela’s National Assembly gave preliminary approval to a new mining bill as the government pledges to move at “Trump speed” to revive the sector and attract foreign investment.】

item.title: 参议院农业委员会主席敦促在油价飙升后实施农场救助计划
item.description: 共和党籍参议院农业委员会主席呼吁向农民提供新的联邦援助，此前因美国对伊朗的军事行动导致汽油、柴油和化肥价格飙升。【原文：The Republican Senate Agriculture Committee chair called for new federal aid to farmers in the wake of a spike in gasoline, diesel and fertilizer prices driven by the US military offensive against Iran.】

item.title: 尽管战争阴云笼罩，澳大利亚消费者信心指数仍小幅上升
item.description: 澳大利亚3月份消费者信心指数小幅上升，但每日数据表明，随着对中东战争的担忧加剧，调查期间的信心指数呈现疲软态势。【原文：Australia’s consumer confidence edged higher in March, though daily readings showed a weakening over the survey period as concerns about the war in the Middle East gathered pace.】

item.title: 亚洲私募信贷追逐收益，美国同行压力加剧
item.description: 亚洲私募信贷基金正逐渐成为对冲1.8万亿美元行业动荡的潜在选择，投资者正寻求该资产类别中更安全的替代方案。【原文：Asia-based private credit funds are emerging as a possible hedge against turmoil gripping the $1.8 trillion industry, as investors seek safer alternatives in the asset class.】

item.title: 习近平的出口巨轮正抛下中国工厂工人
item.description:
那些推动关税逆势繁荣的工人，讲述着工资下滑、工作消失的严峻现实。

【原文：

Workers who powered a tariff-defying boom tell a grim story of falling wages and vanishing jobs.

】

item.title: 黑石集团通过12亿美元贷款助力日本增长
item.description: 黑石集团旗下数据中心运营商AirTrunk Pte作为扩张计划的一部分，已获得日本人工智能基础设施领域最大规模融资之一。【原文：Blackstone Inc.-owned data center operator AirTrunk Pte has secured one of the largest financings in the artificial-intelligence infrastructure sector in Japan as part of an expansion plan.】

item.title: TikTok获准继续在加拿大运营，此前禁令被撤销
item.description: 加拿大将允许TikTok继续在该国运营，此举与政府此前以安全为由要求这家社交媒体公司关闭其加拿大分部的决定形成彻底逆转。【原文：Canada will allow TikTok to continue operating in the country, a complete reversal after the government had previously ordered the social media company to close its Canadian division for security reasons.】

item.title: 油价下跌，因特朗普暗示伊朗冲突即将结束：市场综述
item.description: 油价在早盘交易中暴跌，此前美国总统唐纳德·特朗普暗示伊朗战争可能即将结束；而亚洲股市则有望上涨，因周一华尔街收盘时市场情绪乐观。【原文：Oil tumbled in early trading after US President Donald Trump signaled the Iran war could be ending soon, while Asian equities were set to climb after a bullish end to Monday’s session on Wall Street.】

item.title: 特朗普暗示伊朗战争或将结束，金价趋稳
item.description: 金价持稳，此前因美国总统特朗普表示伊朗战争可能即将结束，美元出现回落。【原文：Gold steadied, after the US dollar retreated on comments by President Donald Trump that the Iran war could be ending soon.】

item.title: 特朗普暗示对伊朗战争"非常彻底"后油价暴跌
item.description: 油价暴跌，因美国总统唐纳德·特朗普暗示伊朗战争可能即将结束。中东冲突正颠覆全球能源市场，并引发对通胀危机的新担忧。【原文：Oil tumbled after US President Donald Trump signaled the Iran war could be ending soon, as the conflict in the Middle East upends global energy markets and sparks fresh concerns about an inflation crisis.】

item.title: 台湾考虑发行首支债券为海外伙伴拓展计划筹资
item.description: 据知情官员透露，台湾正考虑首次发行债券为海外投资融资，这个自治民主地区正加紧努力，以抵御中国施加的外交孤立。【原文：Taiwan is considering selling debt for the first time to finance overseas investments, according to officials familiar with the matter, as the self-ruled democracy intensifies efforts to resist the diplomatic isolation imposed by China.】

item.title: 新加坡与墨尔本新建数据中心由人类脑细胞驱动
item.description: 生物技术初创公司Cortical Labs正在研发两个由人类脑细胞驱动的小型数据中心，通过将实验室培育的神经元植入硅基芯片，这项实验未来或将挑战英伟达等公司的芯片技术。【原文：Biotech startup Cortical Labs is working on two small data centers run by human brain cells, putting lab-grown neurons onto silicon in an experiment that could one day challenge chips from the likes of Nvidia Corp.】
